name: classifies a distributed-system vision into the full-surface namespaces it touches
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-intake.sh" --workload "React SPA REST API Kafka queue Kubernetes Terraform SQL database" --classify 2>c.err; grep -qE 'workload_types=.*iac-cloud' c.err && grep -qE 'activated_probes=[1-9]' c.err && echo classified-distributed 1>&2
